notes: Supports a bounded public biological use case; not a clinical or disease-mechanism proof.
Both public PDAC/TME datasets were analyzed from prepared h5ad files.
Rows with BH-FDR <=0.05 and positive log fold change.
Clusters below the pre-specified minimum cell count are not tested for DE.
Hypergeometric marker-set enrichments with BH-FDR <=0.05; not full pathway GSEA.
Primary cluster DE signatures whose top validation public label matched the expected marker family.
Primary cluster DE signatures whose top validation RMTGuard cluster had the same marker family.
Shared cluster-level marker families between primary and validation datasets.
Do not claim PDAC mechanism, prognosis, therapy, CAF discovery, or clinical validation.
